NAME: MC_PLAN_TYPE_CTGRY_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
FILE(S): 
APL base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 
VALUES: 
1 = Comprehensive medical care 
2 = PCCM 
3 = Medical only prepaid health plan 
4 = LTC PIHP 
5 = Mental health and/or SUD plan 
6 = Dental PAHP 
7 = Transportation PAHP 
8 = Disease management PAHP 
9 = Pharmacy PAHP 
10 = Accountable Care Organization 
11 = Health home or medical home 
12 = Integrated care for dual eligible 
13 = Other 
Null/missing =
